name: get-paper-done
description: A file-based AI workflow for newsletters, blogs, position papers, and white papers.

scripts.check: node bin/gpd.js install claude --dry-run --target /tmp/gpd-install-check && node bin/gpd.js install codex --dry-run --target /tmp/gpd-install-check-codex && node bin/gpd.js version && npm test
scripts.test: node tests/gpd-cli.test.js && node tests/artifact-contracts.test.js && node tests/workflow-consistency.test.js && node tests/workflow-routing.test.js && node tests/workflow-scenarios.test.js && node tests/semantic-gates.test.js
